product.name: 3/4" Push-Fit Ball Valve, DZR Brass
product.productOverview: Ball Valve; Actuation Type Lever Handle; Nominal Size 3/4"; End Connection Push-Fit x Push-Fit; End to End Distance 3.62"; Ball Material Chrome Plated Brass; Body Material DZR Brass; Stem Material Brass; Seat Material PTFE; Seal Material NBR O-Ring; Handle Material Zinc Plated Steel; Port Type Full; Temperature Rating 200 Deg F; Pressure Rating 200 PSI; Inclusions/Features Brass Body End Retainer, Stainless Steel Grab Ring, Zinc Plated Steel Handle Nut; Application Potable and Hydronic Heati...
product.featuresAndBenefits: Lead Free; SharkBite is the Push-Fit Connection System that is Really Taking Hold; Its the Easiest Way to Join Copper, CPVC or PEX Pipe in any Combination with No Soldering, Clamps, Unions or Glue; Just Insert the Pipe and the Stainless Steel Teeth Bite Down and Grip Tight, While a Specially Formulated O-Ring Compresses to Create a Perfect Seal; Disassembly is Just as Fast Using the Simple Disconnect Tool so Fittings and Valves Can be Easily Changed and Reused; They Can Even be Rotated After...
